0.response: {"Q0":"The only strategy I used was to think about which galaxy I wanted while I was digging for gems on the planets."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I usually chose the galaxy with the highest probability.  But occasionally, I chose the galaxy with the lower probability is the value was really high (like a 5, 6 or 7)."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, I thought the instructions and demos were very clear and easy to understand."}

5.response: {"Q0":"No, I didn't dig on the RED planet after he left because I knew the gems would be worthless."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, once he left the RED planet, I stopped collecting those gems in the meteor shower."}

8.response: {"Q0":"No, I tried to focus equally because I knew both were going to earn me money."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I paid very close attention to the message when the RED astronaut said he was leaving."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I knew it meant the red gems would be worthless from that point on."}

10.response: {"Q0":"The only issue I had was not a tach issue.  It's about having to repeat the ENTIRE quiz over again when I only missed 1 out of 13 questions.  This is very tedious and exhausting.  Can you change the game where we only have to repeat the questions we miss?"}

11.response: {"Q0":"Please see previous comment.  Other than the quiz issue, I really enjoyed this game. After I played for a while, I thought it began to seem more like a \"brain game\" than a treasure hunt.  I wondered if this game would help adults stay mentally fit."}
